examples: The speed limit must be rigidly enforced.
I have to plan my academic work very rigidly and set myself clear objectives.
Rooms in Mexican houses are locations for multiple activities that, in contrast, are rigidly separated in the United States.
Like the United States taxes, but I follow that rigidly and, actually, I go beyond that.
Two years ago Thailand was slapped down for suggesting that this principle be applied less rigidly.
